name: 3D File Fetcher
shortDescription: Merge STL meshes from upstream Data Sources into artifacts
description: Connect Data Source node(s) that select STL file(s) in uploads. At execution, meshes are merged and written to your artifact path in MinIO (batch worker, no web server).
inputDescription: STL file(s) via connected Data Source node(s) (uploads)

name.label: Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this 3D transformer node in the pipeline

outputDescription: Merged mesh (STL) under the node artifact path
